zh.Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, United: 英國蘇格蘭培爾阿波內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Laurence Abernethy於大約1175年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內時，他的父親Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy27歲，母親Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway27歲。他於大約1215年與Mary Devorguilla de Galloway在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1245年在蘇格蘭培爾享年71歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, United: 英国苏格兰培爾阿波內
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Laurence Abernethy于大约1175年出生在苏格兰培爾阿波內时，他的父亲Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy27岁，母亲Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway27岁。他于大约1215年与Mary Devorguilla de Galloway在苏格兰培爾阿波內结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1245年在苏格兰培爾享年71岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

en.lifeSummary: When Laurence Abernethy was born about 1175, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy, was 27 and his mother, Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway, was 27. He married Mary Devorguilla de Galloway about 1215, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1245, in Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 71, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Laurence Abernethy est né environ 1175, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mary Devorguilla de Galloway environ 1215, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1245, à Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Laurence Abernethy um 1175 in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy 27 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway 27. Er hat um 1215 in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland Mary Devorguilla de Galloway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1245 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Laurence Abernethy è nato il circa 1175 nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mary Devorguilla de Galloway circa 1215, nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1245, nel Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Laurence Abernethyが約1175年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーで生まれた時，父Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathyは27歳，母Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Gallowayは27歳であった。約1215年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーでMary Devorguilla de Gallowayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1245年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで71歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Laurence Abernethy(이)가 대략 1175년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1215년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 Mary Devorguilla de Galloway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1245년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, United: Abernethy, Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Laurence Abernethy nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Devorguilla de Galloway aproximadamente 1215, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1245, em Perthshire, Scotland, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laurence Abernethy родился около 1175 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Devorguilla de Galloway около 1215 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1245 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Laurence Abernethy nació aproximadamente 1175, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mary Devorguilla de Galloway aproximadamente 1215, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1245, en Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
